action.reasoning: Observation: 20-epoch run with DRW + logit adjustment + mixup gave best val bal_acc 0.8340 (similar to baseline 0.808 eval). Training plateaued around epoch 9. Analysis: The combination may be too aggressive — logit adjustment + class weights compounded. Val accuracy on 1000 samples is noisy. The pipeline is working but improvements are marginal. Decision: Submit eval to see real test score, then try CLIP ViT-B/16 which is typically much stronger for transfer learning.
